julesThoughtProcess: I chose a vibrant neon pink (#FF00FF) because it is a staple of cyberpunk aesthetics and contrasts sharply with the black background. I placed it at coordinates (0, 0) as it is currently empty and will serve as a strong corner piece.
storyPanel: Known as the Pink Glitch, this operative infiltrates secure corporate mainframes using a custom malware suite that leaves a trail of magenta corruption. They move through the digital ether unseen, leaving only neon pink digital footprints behind.
